title: Frontend — install and configure dependencies
description: Install all required frontend packages and configure shadcn/ui, TailwindCSS, and React Router in the Vite project.
acceptanceCriteria: shadcn/ui is initialized and components can be added via CLI
TailwindCSS is configured and utility classes apply correctly
React Hook Form and Zod are installed
npm run dev starts the dev server successfully

steps.details: In src/web/, run: npm install react-router-dom axios react-hook-form @hookform/resolvers zod recharts. Then run: npm install -D @types/react-router-dom.

In src/web/, run: npx shadcn@latest init. When prompted: choose 'Default' style, 'Slate' as base color, use CSS variables for colors: yes. This will configure tailwind.config.js and create src/lib/utils.ts.
Run: npx shadcn@latest add button input label card dropdown-menu dialog table select separator. These are all the components needed for the app.
Run npm run dev in src/web/. Verify dev server starts on port 5173 (or configured port). Run npm run build to verify TypeScript compilation passes. Fix any import or type errors.

technicalNotes: shadcn/ui init will modify tailwind.config.js — commit these changes
The web service in docker-compose serves the built app — use npm run dev for local development
Recharts types are included in the package — no @types/recharts needed
